context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the collection ranking pipeline: boost/bury score formulas, exclusion via map deletion, manual pinning with score 999 and 1-based positions, and the correct ordering of operations.

checklist.name: Boost formula
checklist.description: Boost increases a product's score by adding (boostValue / 100) to the current score (e.g. score + 40/100 for a +40 boost), using 50 as default if no value specified

checklist.name: Bury formula
checklist.description: Bury decreases a product's score by subtracting (buryValue / 100) from the current score (e.g. score - 60/100 for a -60 bury), using 50 as default if no value specified

checklist.name: Exclusion removes from scores
checklist.description: Excluded products are removed from the scores map/structure entirely (not set to 0 or -1), so they do not appear in output

checklist.name: Pinned score 999
checklist.description: Pinned products are assigned a score of 999 (not just placed at their position)

checklist.name: isPinned flag
checklist.description: Pinned products have an isPinned: true flag (or equivalent boolean field) in the output

checklist.name: 1-based position insert
checklist.description: A pin to position N inserts the product at array index N-1 (1-based), and the insert index is clamped to the array length if N exceeds the total product count

checklist.name: Score-descending sort
checklist.description: Non-pinned products are sorted in descending score order before pins are applied

checklist.name: Pins processed in position order
checklist.description: When multiple pins exist, they are inserted in ascending position order (pin to slot 1 before slot 3) to avoid index shifting conflicts

checklist.name: Scoring before overrides
checklist.description: Boost/bury rules are applied to scores before manual pin/exclude overrides are processed (correct pipeline order)

checklist.name: Priority order for rules
checklist.description: Boost/bury rules are applied in priority order (higher priority number = applied first) or the implementation otherwise defines explicit rule precedence

checklist.name: Duplicate pin removal
checklist.description: If a pinned product already appears in the sorted list, it is removed from its current position before being inserted at the pin position
